author: doll-agent
content: cargo fmt across 49 files. cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean at 0.3.5. Workspace test suite green: 3061 tests passing across all crates (excluding ferray-numpy-interop / ferray-python which need pyo3 link config). Fixed pre-existing kernel_edge_i8_signed_handles_partial overflow by switching the test harness to wrapping_mul/wrapping_sub. Bumped version 0.3.2 → 0.3.5 in workspace Cargo.toml + the per-crate path-version pins. Wrote curated 0.3.5 CHANGELOG entry covering ~30 new features grouped by crate. Added What's-new section to root README.
